calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Nov-23-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Scott Mcdaniel, William Lamont And Kenneth Lamont (Notices)
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:30:06 a.m. and concluding at 10:41:00 a.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C. represented by Mark M. Scott, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Scott McDaniel not appearing.
Defendant William Lamont AKA Matt Lamont not appearing.
Defendant Kenneth Lamont not appearing.

MATTHEW JACOBS, Senior Litigation Paralegal is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Equipment Financing Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Acceptance Certificate
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - Guarantee Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Assignment from Bank of the West
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - MAK Construction Payment History
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Declaration of Matthew Jacobs
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - Account Balance Statements attached to Matthew Jacobs Declaration

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C. , and against Defendants Scott McDaniel, William Lamont AKA Matt Lamont, and Kenneth Lamont.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C. is awarded judgment against Defendant Scott McDaniel, William Lamont AKA Matt Lamont, and Kenneth Lamont as follows:

Damages: $45,615.85
Attorney Fees: $2,689.31
Costs: $1,345.00

Total Judgment: $49,650.16

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Oct-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
